title: Web Client Adapter & SvelteKit Scaffold Design
summary: Specifies the ConnectRPC HTTP adapter in the gateway process, a web-facing protobuf WebService, and a minimal embedded SvelteKit scaffold proving the full browser-to-core pipeline works end-to-end. Sub-spec 1 of 3 for Epic 8 (Web Client), covering scaffolding and adapter only, not terminal/chat UX or portal pages.
